name: HAMMONIA Schiffsholding AG
summary: HAMMONIA Schiffsholding AG engages in the shipping business. It operates a fleet of six full container ships with a capacity of between 2,500 TEU and 7,800 TEU; and approximately 30,000 container storage spaces. The company was formerly known as HCI Hammonia Shipping AG and changed its name to HAMMONIA Schiffsholding AG in September 2017. HAMMONIA Schiffsholding AG was founded in 2006 and is based in Hamburg, Germany.
